title: neolepisorus phyllomanes
intro: Neolepisorus phyllomanes, also known as the Chinese fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Neolepisorus phyllomanes include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
